scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/spec && tsc --noEmit -p packages/editor && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp-server && tsc --noEmit -p packages/patterns
scripts.test: bun test --cwd packages/spec && bun test --cwd packages/editor && bun test --cwd packages/mcp-server && bun test --cwd packages/patterns
scripts.check: fallow dead-code --fail-on-issues && fallow health --max-cyclomatic 10 --max-crap 30 && fallow dupes --mode mild && fallow dead-code --boundary-violations
